title: Athirapally, Kochi & Thenmala Tour
description: Embark on a natural and heritage tour across Kerala. Witness the spectacular Athirapally and Vazhachal waterfalls, explore the history and backwaters of Fort Kochi and Mattancherry, and experience eco-tourism, wildlife, and laser shows in Thenmala.
highlights: Witness the breathtaking Athirapally and Vazhachal waterfalls
Tour the historic sites of Mattancherry and Fort Kochi
Enjoy a relaxing 3-hour backwater boating tour
Explore Thenmala Dam, Deer Park, and Palaruvi and Kuttikalam Waterfalls
Watch the spectacular Laser Show at Thenmala
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change

title: Bali: Bliss & Island Magic
description: Discover the spiritual serenity and natural wonders of the 'Island of the Gods'. Explore the artistic villages, green valleys, and Sacred Monkey Forest of Ubud, and walk along the cliffs of Uluwatu to watch a traditional fire dance at sunset. Hike the active Mount Batur volcano at sunrise, participate in a purification ritual at Tirta Empul's holy springs, and unwind on the pristine beaches of Seminyak, surrounded by luxury and peace.
highlights: Watch the legendary Kecak fire dance at the cliffside Uluwatu Temple at sunset
Explore Ubud's lush Tegalalang Rice Terraces and Sacred Monkey Forest
Visit the famous offshore Tanah Lot Temple for breathtaking coastal views
Unwind along Seminyak's beautiful beaches, boutique shops, and dining hubs
Trek up Mount Batur at sunrise for panoramic views of Bali's volcanic caldera
Participate in spiritual purification rituals at Tirta Empul Holy Spring

title: Bangalore, Hyderabad & Coorg: Heritage Cities & Coffee Estates
description: A premium tour combining Bangalore's urban parks, Hyderabad's rich Nizami heritage (Charminar, Golconda Fort), the royal grandeur of Mysore Palace, and the peaceful, misty coffee estates of Coorg.
highlights: Tour Hyderabad's historic Charminar and Golconda Fort
Explore Coorg's Dubare Elephant Camp and Abbey Falls
Visit Mysore Palace and Bangalore's Lalbagh Botanical Gardens

title: Chikmagalur, Mysore & Coorg Tour
description: Experience Karnataka's finest heritage and hill stations. Trek through the mist-covered coffee hills of Chikmagalur, admire the historic palaces of Mysore, and explore the waterfalls, elephant camps, and monasteries of Coorg.
highlights: Enjoy a full-day trekking (trucking) expedition in Chikmagalur
Tour the magnificent Mysore Palace and Chamundi Hills
Enjoy the colorful lights and water show at Brindavan Gardens
Interact with elephants at Dubare Elephant Camp in Coorg
Walk through Nisargadhama island and visit the Tibetan Golden Temple
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change

title: Coorg, Hyderabad & Hogenakkal: Hills, Heritage & Waterfalls
description: Experience the cool mist of Coorg's coffee valleys, the royal Nizami charm and film city attractions of Hyderabad, and the roaring, Kaveri river cascades of Hogenakkal waterfalls. A complete tour of Central and Southern India.
highlights: Spend a full day exploring the grand sets of Ramoji Film City
Explore Coorg's Abbey Falls, Golden Temple, and Raja's Seat
Experience a traditional coracle ride at Hogenakkal Falls
Tour the historic Charminar and Golconda Fort in Hyderabad

title: Coorg & Mysore: Hills, Heritage & Thrills
description: A fantastic 3-day journey from the misty coffee plantations of Coorg to the historic palaces of Mysore and the thrilling adventure rides of Wonderla. Visit elephant camps, Buddhist monasteries, royal palaces, and experience high-speed waterslides.
highlights: Walk through the fragrant coffee estates and waterfalls of Coorg
Visit the Namdroling Monastery (Golden Temple) in Bylakuppe
Tour the historic Mysore Palace and Brindavan Gardens
Enjoy a full day of entertainment at Wonderla Amusement Park

title: Dubai: Luxury & Desert Safari
description: Step into a city where futuristic skyscrapers rise out of golden desert sands. Admire the world's tallest building, the Burj Khalifa, and the iconic sail-shaped Burj Al Arab. Shop at the massive Dubai Mall, explore the historic Gold and Spice Souks, and experience traditional Emirati culture. Highlight your journey with an exciting 4x4 desert safari, complete with dune bashing, camel riding, and a BBQ dinner under a starry desert sky.
highlights: Ascend to the observation deck of the world's tallest tower, the Burj Khalifa
Vibrant shopping excursions at the Dubai Mall and historic gold & spice souks
Thrilling 4x4 desert safari with dune bashing, camel riding, and sandboarding
Enjoy a traditional Arabian night BBQ dinner under the desert stars
Relax on scenic coastal yacht cruises and view the iconic Burj Al Arab
Experience traditional Emirati culture and warm hospitality

title: Goa, Dandeli & Chikmagalur: Beaches, Rafting & Coffee Hills
description: Embark on an adventure of a lifetime. Relax on Goa's beaches, go white-water rafting and jungle safari in Dandeli, visit the heritage sites of Shimoga, and trek through the lush coffee estates of Chikmagalur.
highlights: Enjoy water sports and nightlife on Goa's sun-kissed beaches
Go white-water rafting and crocodile spotting in Dandeli
Trek Mullayanagiri Peak and walk coffee plantations in Chikmagalur

title: Goa: Beach & Heritage Getaway
description: Experience the perfect harmony of vibrant coastal energy and historical grandeur in India's ultimate beach destination. Relax under the sun on the golden sands of Baga and Calangute, explore the majestic Portuguese architecture and historic cathedrals of Old Goa, and dive into thrilling water sports at Anjuna Beach. Conclude your day with a scenic cruise along the Mandovi River as you savor Goa's unique fusion of Indian and European cultures.
highlights: Unwind on the bustling golden sands of Baga and Calangute beaches
Explore UNESCO-listed Portuguese-era churches and heritage sites in Old Goa
Thrilling water sports and legendary seaside nightlife at Anjuna Beach
Scenic sunset boat cruise with traditional music along the Mandovi River
Relax in the peaceful and pristine atmosphere of Palolem Beach in South Goa
Indulge in authentic Indo-Portuguese culinary tours and local street food

title: Delhi & Agra: Golden Triangle Heritage
description: Journey through the epicenters of India's royal history and architectural genius. Uncover the layers of Old and New Delhi as you explore the colossal Red Fort, the ancient Qutub Minar, and the bustling bazaar of Chandni Chowk. Travel to Agra to behold the Taj Mahal, a monument of pure white marble and eternal love, before touring the historic sandstone chambers of Agra Fort and the ghost city of Fatehpur Sikri.
highlights: Guided tours of Delhi's iconic Red Fort, Qutub Minar, and India Gate
Vibrant rickshaw ride through the narrow lanes of historic Chandni Chowk
Witness the breathtaking beauty of the Taj Mahal at sunrise or sunset
Explore the imposing red sandstone fortress of Agra Fort
Walk through the deserted Mughal imperial capital of Fatehpur Sikri
Experience a perfect blend of rich culture, history, and Mughal cuisine

title: Hampi, Goa & Mysore: Ruins, Beaches & Palaces
description: A grand 6-day holiday blending the ancient stone temples of Hampi, the tropical beaches and river cruises of Goa, the royal palaces of Mysore, and a day of amusement park fun at Wonderla.
highlights: Tour the ancient Vijayanagara ruins and temples in Hampi
Enjoy a Mandovi River sunset cruise and beach sports in Goa
Explore the illuminated Mysore Palace and Chamundi Hills
Enjoy high-thrill rides and adventure at Wonderla Amusement Park

title: Himachal: Scenic Alpine Escapes
description: Escape to the majestic heights of the Himalayas on a journey through Himachal Pradesh's most picturesque valleys and hill stations. Walk the colonial lanes of Shimla, experience high altitude adventure sports in Solang Valley, and breathe in the spiritual serenity of Dharamshala and McLeod Ganj. From the apple orchards of Kasauli to the breathtaking pine forested meadows of Dalhousie and Khajjiar, often called Mini Switzerland, this alpine retreat is a paradise for adventurers and nature lovers alike.
highlights: Breathtaking hikes and adventure sports in the valleys of Manali and Kullu
Explore colonial heritage and panoramic views on the historic Shimla Ridge
Visit the spiritual monasteries of Dharamshala and McLeod Ganj
Discover the pine-forested meadows of Dalhousie and Khajjiar
Thrilling paragliding, zorbing, and winter skiing in Solang Valley
Stroll through the tranquil, lush apple orchards of Kasauli

title: Hogenakkal, Yercaud & Kodaikanal Hills
description: A refreshing trip through Tamil Nadu's finest nature and hill stations. Enjoy boating at the roaring Hogenakkal falls, visit the orchards and parks of Yercaud, and explore the lakes, views, and pine forests of Kodaikanal.
highlights: Enjoy a traditional boating experience at Hogenakkal Falls
Visit Yercaud's Orange Farm, Deer Park, and Fish Park
Take in panoramic vistas from Yercaud's key View Points
Explore Kodaikanal Lake, the Pillar Rocks, and Suicide Point
Relax with a cozy evening Campfire
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change

title: Holy Land: Historical & Spiritual Pilgrimage
description: Embark on a profound journey through Jordan, Israel, and Egypt. Visit holy sites including Mount Nebo, Nazareth, Cana, Mount of Beatitude, Capernaum, the Sea of Galilee, Jaffa, Mount of Olives, Gethsemane, Jericho, Dead Sea, Bethlehem, Golgotha, Bethany, and the pyramids of Cairo.
highlights: Visit Mount Nebo, Nazareth, Cana, and Mount of Beatitudes
Sail on the Sea of Galilee and float in the Dead Sea
Explore Jerusalem (Mount of Olives, Garden of Gethsemane, Golgotha)
Tour Bethlehem, Jericho, Jaffa, and the Pyramids of Giza in Cairo
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change

title: Hyderabad: The City of Pearls
description: Discover the heritage and modern entertainment of Hyderabad. Tour the iconic Charminar and Golconda Fort, marvel at the exhibits in Salar Jung Museum, visit Birla Temple, walk through NTR Gardens, see the Lumbini Park laser show, and explore Ramoji Film City.
highlights: Spend a full day at the world-famous Ramoji Film City
Tour the historic Charminar and Mecca Masjid
Explore the archaeological wonders of Golconda Fort
Visit the Salar Jung Museum and white-marble Birla Temple
Enjoy NTR Gardens and the Lumbini Park Laser Show
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change

title: Jog Falls, Hampi & Goa: Waterfalls, Ruins & Beaches
description: Discover the spectacular ruins of the Vijayanagara Empire in Hampi, marvel at the majestic height of Jog Falls (one of India's tallest waterfalls), and unwind on the sandy beaches and heritage churches of Goa.
highlights: Explore the UNESCO World Heritage ruins of Hampi (Virupaksha Temple, Stone Chariot)
Witness the breathtaking, roaring cascades of Jog Falls in Shimoga
Unwind on the golden sand beaches of Goa and explore Old Goa heritage

title: Kashmir: Magical Escape
description: Discover a true heaven on earth where snow-capped peaks mirror off tranquil alpine lakes. Stay in a deluxe houseboat on Srinagar's Dal Lake, glide past floating markets on a traditional shikara, and wander through historic Mughal Gardens. Explore the flower-filled alpine meadows and world-class ski slopes of Gulmarg and Pahalgam, and lose yourself in the pristine glaciers and mountain streams of Sonmarg. Kashmir's beauty promises memories that will last a lifetime.
highlights: Deluxe houseboat stay and sunset shikara ride on Srinagar's Dal Lake
Tour the historic Shalimar and Nishat Mughal Gardens and spring Tulip Gardens
Scenic Gondola cable car ride to high mountain peaks in Gulmarg
Explore Betaab Valley and walk along the pristine Lidder River in Pahalgam
Trek through the majestic alpine glaciers of Sonmarg, the Meadow of Gold
Immerse in warm Kashmiri hospitality and traditional local gastronomy

title: Kerala: Serene Backwaters & Hills
description: Immerse yourself in 'God's Own Country' with a journey that seamlessly blends tranquil backwaters, misty mountain peaks, and sun-kissed beaches. Cruise the serene waters of Vembanad Lake in a private houseboat, walk through the sprawling tea estates of Munnar and Wayanad, and unwind along the cliffs of Kovalam and Varkala. From witnessing authentic Kathakali performances in Fort Kochi to spotting exotic wildlife in Periyar National Park, this tour offers a complete rejuvenation of the mind, body, and spirit.
highlights: Overnight cruise on Alleppey's backwaters in a traditional luxury houseboat
Beachside relaxation along the scenic shores of Kovalam and Varkala
Trekking through the misty tea and spice plantations of Munnar and Wayanad
Guided cultural tour of Fort Kochi with live Kathakali dance performances
Rejuvenating traditional Ayurvedic treatments in serene settings
Wildlife and birdwatching excursions in Periyar National Park

title: Kodaikanal, Hogenakkal & Mysore: Lakes, Falls & Palaces
description: A beautiful tour linking Kodaikanal's hill-station charm, the raw power of Hogenakkal Falls, royal palace heritage in Mysore, and the theme park rides of Wonderla. A complete family holiday package.
highlights: Enjoy boating on Kodaikanal Lake and tour Coaker's Walk
Experience a coracle boat ride at Hogenakkal Falls
Tour the illuminated Mysore Palace and Chamundi Hills
Enjoy a full day of thrilling rides at Wonderla Amusement Park

title: Kodaikanal & Munnar: Double Hill-Station & Thrills
description: Escape to two of South India's most beloved hill stations, Kodaikanal and Munnar, followed by a day of adventure. Visit the star-shaped Kodai Lake, walk through the misty tea gardens of Munnar, and ride the rollercoasters at Wonderla.
highlights: Explore Kodaikanal's Pillar Rocks and Coaker's Walk
Walk in Munnar's tea plantations and Echo Point
Enjoy high-energy rides and amusement at Wonderla

title: Kodaikanal: Tranquil Hills Escape
description: Breathe in the fresh mountain air of Kodaikanal, a serene sanctuary hidden in the hills of Tamil Nadu. Take a peaceful boat ride on the star-shaped Kodaikanal Lake, walk the misty mountain paths of Coaker's Walk, and explore the towering monoliths of Pillar Rocks and the Guna Caves. Complete your retreat with visits to the roaring Silver Cascade and Bear Shola waterfalls, surrounded by forests where the legendary Kurinji flower blooms.
highlights: Enjoy peaceful boating on the tranquil, star-shaped Kodaikanal Lake
Walk along Coaker's Walk for sweeping, misty views of the valleys below
Explore the towering Pillar Rocks and the mysterious Guna Caves
Visit the scenic and refreshing Silver Cascade and Bear Shola waterfalls
Trek through eucalyptus forests and discover the rare Kurinji flower fields
Relax in the peaceful, slow-paced atmosphere of the Nilgiri hills

title: Malaysia: Kuala Lumpur & Genting Highlands
description: Explore the vibrant heart of Malaysia. Tour the bustling capital of Kuala Lumpur, marvel at the towering Petronas Twin Towers, visit the historic Independence Square and the serene National Mosque. Venture up to the cool slopes of Genting Highlands for mountain scenery, theme parks, and entertainment.
highlights: Explore iconic sights in Kuala Lumpur: Petronas Twin Towers and Independence Square
Visit the historic and majestic King's Palace (Istana Negara)
Enjoy the serene atmosphere of the National Mosque
Day trip to Genting Highlands with a scenic cable car ride
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change

title: Maldives: Paradise Island Escape
description: Escape to a tropical wonderland where endless blue waters meet pristine white sand beaches. Designed for travelers seeking paradise on a budget, this 3-night, 4-day tropical getaway features comfortable hotel stays, delicious all-inclusive meals, and guided activities. Swim among vibrant coral reefs, explore local Maldivian islands, and try your hand at sunset line fishing, with free underwater photography to preserve your island memories forever.
highlights: An affordable 4-day getaway to the world's most beautiful islands
Enjoy comfortable beachside accommodations with all-inclusive meals
Guided snorkeling safaris with free underwater photography included
Explore local islands to experience traditional Maldivian culture
Experience traditional line fishing at sunset on the Indian Ocean
Leisure time to unwind on pristine, powdery white sand beaches

title: Munnar, Chinnar & Marayoor Eco-Tour
description: A wonderful weekend getaway into the hills and forests of Munnar. Spot rare wildlife at Eravikulam National Park, visit scenic dams and echo points, go trekking in Chinnar Wildlife Sanctuary, and explore Marayoor's sandalwood forests.
highlights: Explore Eravikulam National Park and view tea plantations
Visit Mattupetty Dam, Echo Point, and Kundala Dam in Munnar
Embark on a guided trekking (trucking) adventure in Chinnar Sanctuary
Walk through the fragrant Sandalwood Forests of Marayoor
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change

title: Munnar, Thekkady & Alleppey: Highlands & Backwaters
description: Experience the classic Kerala highlands and backwaters circuit. Trek Munnar's tea estates, enjoy a wildlife boating safari in Periyar Lake (Thekkady), walk the pine forests of Wagamon, and cruise on a traditional Alleppey houseboat.
highlights: Walk through the tea estates and echo points of Munnar
Take a guided wildlife safari on Periyar Lake in Thekkady
Walk through the serene Pine Forest and green meadows of Wagamon
Overnight cruise and traditional meals on an Alleppey houseboat

title: Munnar & Wonderla: Hills & Amusement Thrills
description: Enjoy a perfect balance of highland tranquility and high-energy excitement. Stroll through the misty, endless tea plantations of Munnar, spot rare Nilgiri Tahr in Eravikulam, and spend a full day of thrilling rides and water slides at Wonderla Amusement Park near Kochi.
highlights: Trek through the rolling, green tea estates of Munnar
Spot rare wildlife in Eravikulam National Park
Spend a full day of adventure at Wonderla Amusement Park

title: Mysore, Bangalore & Hogenakkal: Royal Cities & Waterfalls
description: Tour the cosmopolitan capital Bangalore, the royal heritage city Mysore, and the roaring Hogenakkal waterfalls. See palaces, technological hubs, botanical gardens, and experience a traditional coracle boat ride.
highlights: Visit Bangalore Palace and the serene Lalbagh Botanical Gardens
Tour the majestic Mysore Palace and Chamundi Hills
Take a thrilling coracle boat ride at Hogenakkal Falls

title: Mysore & Hogenakkal: Palaces & Waterfalls Tour
description: Combine the royal heritage of Mysore with the raw natural power of Hogenakkal Falls. Marvel at the grand architecture of Mysore Palace and Brindavan Gardens, then take a traditional coracle boat ride down the roaring, misty waters of the Kaveri river at Hogenakkal.
highlights: Tour the historic Mysore Palace and Chamundi Hills
Experience a thrilling coracle boat ride at Hogenakkal Falls
Relax in the serene garden settings of Mysore

title: Nelliyampathi, Munnar & Alleppey: Eco-Hills & Houseboat
description: Immerse yourself in Kerala's finest nature reserves and backwaters. Visit the untouched orange orchards and misty valleys of Nelliyampathi, tour Munnar's tea gardens, explore historic Fort Kochi, and cruise Alleppey's backwaters on a private houseboat.
highlights: Explore Nelliyampathi's orange farms and Seetharkundu viewpoint
Walk in the tea plantations and spice farms of Munnar
See Fort Kochi's Chinese Fishing Nets and historical churches
Enjoy an overnight stay on a traditional luxury Alleppey houseboat

title: Ooty & Mysore: Royal Heritage & Scenic Hills
description: Embark on a delightful short escape combining the royal history of Mysore and the misty charm of Ooty. Stroll through the majestic Mysore Palace and the colorful Brindavan Gardens, then climb into the Nilgiri hills to experience Ooty's quiet lakes and sprawling tea gardens.
highlights: Explore the magnificent Mysore Palace and its evening illuminations
Walk through the musical fountain paths of Brindavan Gardens
Enjoy a relaxing boat cruise on the scenic Ooty Lake
Visit the lush Botanical Gardens and Doddabetta Peak

title: Ooty: Blue Hills & Tea Gardens Retreat
description: Discover the colonial charm and scenic grandeur of the Nilgiri Hills. Ride the historic, UNESCO-listed Nilgiri Mountain Railway toy train as it winds past tea gardens and deep ravines. Learn the secrets of tea production at the Ooty Tea Museum, take a quiet rowboat out on Ooty Lake, and explore the rich floral diversity of the Botanical Gardens before standing atop Doddabetta Peak to witness panoramic views of the Blue Mountains.
highlights: Ride the historic, UNESCO-listed Nilgiri Mountain Railway Toy Train
Guided tea estate walks and tastings at the Ooty Tea Museum
Scenic rowboat cruise on the peaceful waters of Ooty Lake
Stroll through the beautifully manicured Ooty Botanical Gardens
Stand atop Doddabetta Peak, the highest point in South India, for stunning views
Explore colonial-era architecture and historical stone buildings

title: Rameshwaram, Dhanushkodi & Kodaikanal Tour
description: A diverse journey combining spiritual pilgrimage, historic ghost towns, lush grape farms, and cool hill stations. Visit Rameswaram Temple and Dhanushkodi, tour the grape gardens of Theni, explore Wagamon's pine forests, and see Kodaikanal's lakes and cliffs.
highlights: Visit the historic Ramanathaswamy Temple in Rameswaram
Explore the ghost town of Dhanushkodi and Abdul Kalam Museum
Tour the grape farms of Cumbum and Theni
Walk in the Pine Valley Forest and Mottakunnu hills in Wagamon
Explore Kodaikanal Lake, Pillar Rocks, and Suicide Point
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change

title: Singapore: City of Gardens & Entertainment
description: Experience the ultimate fusion of modern architecture and nature in Singapore. Walk along Orchard Road, view the city from Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, visit the historic Thian Hock Temple, explore Sentosa Island, enjoy Universal Studios, and see exotic birds at Jurong Bird Park.
highlights: Ascend the Marina Bay Sands SkyPark and shop on Orchard Road
See Suntec City's Fountain of Wealth and the famous Merlion
Visit the historical Thian Hock Temple and Sentosa Island
Enjoy a full day at Universal Studios Singapore and visit Jurong Bird Park
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change

title: Thailand: Bangkok & Pattaya Explorer
description: Discover the vibrant cities of Bangkok and Pattaya. Enjoy the gorgeous beaches and water activities at Coral Island, watch the spectacular Alcazar Show, visit the Sri Racha Tiger Zoo, and experience the thrill of Safari World and Marine Park.
highlights: Attend the world-famous Alcazar Cabaret Show in Pattaya
Take a speedboat trip to Coral Island for beach activities
Explore the Sri Racha Tiger Zoo
Enjoy a full day at Safari World and Marine Park in Bangkok
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change

title: Theyyam: Mystical Ritual of Malabar
description: Experience the mystical world of Theyyam, an ancient ritual dance drama of North Kerala. Witness the divine invocation where mortals dress as deities, wearing elaborate red makeup, heavy ornaments, and towering headgear. Feel the intense devotion, traditional percussion, and fire-walking rituals in the sacred groves (kavus) of Kannur and Kasaragod. A once-in-a-lifetime spiritual journey into the heart of Malabar's folklore and ancient traditions.
highlights: Witness authentic live Theyyam performances in traditional village shrines (kavus)
Interact with Theyyam artists and learn about the sacred makeup and towering headgears
Experience the vibrant drum beats, ancient chants, and mystical fire-walking rituals
Guided cultural tour focused entirely on the history and spiritual significance of Theyyam

title: Trivandrum, Kanyakumari & Ponmudi: Southern Hills & Coast
description: Uncover the scenic diversity of India's far south. Visit Trivandrum's heritage sites, watch the sunrise and sunset at Vivekananda Rock in Kanyakumari, climb the winding hairpin bends of Ponmudi hill station, and experience eco-tourism in Thenmala.
highlights: Tour Padmanabhaswamy Temple and Kovalam Beach in Trivandrum
Explore Kanyakumari Rock Memorial and Gandhi Memorial
Trek the misty, winding peaks of Ponmudi Hill Station
See Thenmala Dam, Deer Park, and the musical fountain show

title: Trivandrum, Kanyakumari & Thenmala
description: Experience the culture, beaches, and natural beauty of Southern India. Explore Trivandrum's temples and galleries, see Kanyakumari's famous rock memorial, enjoy Kovalam Beach, and experience eco-tourism and waterfalls in Thenmala.
highlights: Visit Padmanabha Swami Temple, Trivandrum Zoo, and Art Gallery
Explore Kanyakumari and Vivekananda Rock Memorial (Vivekananda Para)
Relax on Kovalam Beach and visit Kanyakumari Palace
See Thenmala Dam, Palaruvi Water Falls, Kuttalam Waterfalls, and the Laser Show
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change

title: Trivandrum & Kanyakumari: Southern Tip Getaway
description: Discover the spiritual and coastal highlights of India's southern tip. Visit the historic temples of Trivandrum, relax on the golden shores of Kovalam Beach, and stand at the confluence of three oceans in Kanyakumari to witness a spectacular sunset over the Vivekananda Rock Memorial.
highlights: Visit the legendary Sree Padmanabhaswamy Temple in Trivandrum
Watch the sunset at the Vivekananda Rock Memorial in Kanyakumari
Relax on the crescent beaches of Kovalam

title: Trivandrum, Kanyakumari & Wonderla: Coast & Theme Park
description: Enjoy a coastal exploration of Trivandrum and Kanyakumari, followed by a day of non-stop action at Wonderla Amusement Park. Visit historic temples, beaches, Vivekananda Rock, and enjoy top-tier amusement park rides.
highlights: Tour Padmanabhaswamy Temple and Kovalam Beach in Trivandrum
Witness the sunrise and sunset in Kanyakumari
Spend an exciting day at Wonderla Amusement Park

title: Vietnam: Cultural Discovery
description: Immerse yourself in Vietnam's rich heritage. Explore Hanoi's historic sites including the Temple of Literature and Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, enjoy a traditional Water Puppet Show by Hoan Kiem Lake, and cruise through the majestic limestone islands of Halong Bay.
highlights: Visit Hanoi's historic Temple of Literature and Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum
Enjoy a traditional Water Puppet Show in Hanoi
Walk around the peaceful shores of Hoan Kiem Lake
Cruise through the spectacular limestone karsts of Halong Bay
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change

title: Wagamon, Thekkady & Wonderla Escape
description: An action-packed holiday combining hill stations, wildlife, and theme park amusement. Experience the serene pine forests of Wagamon, wildlife boating in Thekkady, the monumental hills of Ramakkalmedu and Paruthumpara, and the fun rides at Wonderla.
highlights: Explore Wagamon's Pine Valley Forest and Mottakunnu hills
Enjoy a wildlife watching boat safari in Periyar Lake, Thekkady
Visit the windy heights and historic monuments of Ramakkalmedu
Admire the panoramic canyon view at Paruthumpara (Eagle Rock)
Enjoy a full day of excitement at Wonderla Amusement Park
Please note: Itinerary details are subject to change

title: Wayanad & Ooty: Scenic Hills & Theme Park Tour
description: Immerse yourself in the double hill-station paradise of Wayanad and Ooty, combined with water park fun. Walk through Wayanad's spice forests, cruise Ooty Lake, and enjoy the high-thrill wave pools and water slides of Black Thunder Theme Park.
highlights: Explore Edakkal Caves and Banasura Sagar Dam in Wayanad
Tour Ooty's Botanical Gardens and Doddabetta Peak
Enjoy a full day of water activities at Black Thunder Theme Park

title: Wayanad, Ooty & Mysore: Heritage, Hills & Thrills
description: A comprehensive 4-day tour covering the best of South Indian hills, heritage, and entertainment. Trek the spice hills of Wayanad, ride the toy train in Ooty, tour the historic Mysore Palace, and scream on the rollercoasters of Wonderla.
highlights: Visit Edakkal Caves and Banasura Sagar Dam in Wayanad
Stroll through Ooty's tea gardens and Doddabetta Peak
Tour Mysore Palace and watch the musical fountain show
Enjoy a full day of excitement at Wonderla Amusement Park
